THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAGG TEAM HARDWOOD INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALBERT, JAMES $4,180.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,180.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27850 ON 4/14/05. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. THIS AMOUNT REPRESENTS $4,690.00 IN PRINCIPAL SOUGHT BY THE APPELLANT PLUS COSTS OF $22.00. THIS AMOUNT IS OFFSET BY THE DEFENSE/CROSS- COMPLAINT IN THE AMOUNT OF $532.00. ($4,712-$532.00 = $4,180.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
